case_title: KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE INC. VS. GARLAND GILL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. PLAINTIFF IS REPRESENTED BY JOHN LEGASPI-COMMUNITY RELATIONS PUBLIC INFO. OFFICER.NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,266.81 FILED BY KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE INC. AS TO DEFENDANT GILL, GARLAND ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-01-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
